events.title: DOUBLE XP WEEKEND
events.desc:
# Double XP Weekend 💥

The affinity cap has been raised and to celebrate, we've got double account and affinity XP all weekend - starting tomorrow! 

Login and play between <t:1775822400:f> and <t:1776081600:f> to earn those levels! 📈

🔔 @Official News

events.title: DEV STREAM FOR V1.13
events.desc:
Hey everyone!

Quick heads up - patch notes for V1.13 will be dropping on April 7th due to the Easter Holidays. 

This **doesn't affect the update** itself, which will launch as planned on **April 7th** as well. 

We'll be going through a bunch of new stuff in our Dev Stream on Wednesday 1st, so be sure to tune in and find out more about what's coming up in V1.13: Throne of Thorns!

events.title: V1.13 DEV STREAM
events.desc:
# 🎥 v1.13 Dev Stream - 1st April 

v1.13 Throne of Thorns is just around the corner! We'll be live on Twitch next week for a first look at the new update 🌹

Mark it in your calendar and we'll see you in chat!
🗓️01 April | ⏰ 6PM UTC / 2PM ET

🔔

events.title: ADELE RELEASE
events.desc:
Thorns are spreading across the battlefield… 🌹 

That can only mean one thing...

Adele is joining the fight in V1.13: Throne of Thorns, coming April 7th!

https://youtu.be/_mxjJioNuhI

🔔 @Official News
Adele Queen of Thorns | Reveal Trailer | Predecessor
Adele joins the fight in update 1.13: Throne of Thorns on April 7th!

Predecessor redefines the modern MOBA genre, blending stunning realistic environments with explosive third-person action. 

PLAY NOW!
https://playp.red/playnow

events.title: DAYBREAK V4
events.desc:
🌇 Size - adjusted 
🗺️ Layout - improved
🏃 Lower Mobility Heroes - empowered

Daybreak V4 is coming in V1.13: Throne of Thorns on April 7th - bringing some of the most exciting changes yet! 🔥

events.title: V1.13: THRONE OF THORNS
events.desc:
V1.13: Throne of Thorns drops April 7th - very soon 👀

And we’ve got some news to share... here's first of them:

Hero Affinity level cap is increasing all the way to Level 99! 🔥

You asked for it, and it’s finally here. Time to push your mains further than ever before 💪

🔔

events.title: ZARUS PLUSH
events.desc:
He’s here! 🤗

We’ve teamed up with Youtooz for our very first merch drop - introducing the plush version of our own Nyrian Gladiator, Zarus! 🦎

Pre-orders go live on their website starting April 7, and we’ll let you know the moment they’re available 🗓️

We’ll also be giving away some plushies to a few lucky winners, so stay tuned for more details!

🔔 @Official News

events.title: ZARUS PLUSH LAST CHANCE
events.desc:
# ⏰ Zarus Plush Last Chance!

There's only 6 hours left to get your hands on your very own, limited edition Zarus plush from YouTooz! <:ZarusHappy:1136260095005696102> 

Head over to https://youtooz.com/products/zarus-plush-9-inch and get your order in while there's still time ⌛ 

🔔 @Official News
Zarus Plush (9in) – Youtooz Collectibles
The Plush Zarus' search for godhood has led him to his most intense challenge yet, becoming a Youtooz plush! Sitting at 9 inches tall and gripping the green-tipped Spear of Nyr in his right hand as a jagged smile crosses his grey face, small spikes run along the outside of his head up to a pair of long horns at the top
